test.create_query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS delta_decode_{type} (n {type} CODEC(Delta)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO delta_decode_{type} (n) SELECT number FROM system.numbers LIMIT 100000000 SETTINGS max_threads=1
OPTIMIZE TABLE delta_decode_{type} FINAL SETTINGS optimize_throw_if_noop = 1
test.query: SELECT count() FROM delta_decode_{type} WHERE NOT ignore(n) SETTINGS max_threads=1
